footer.caption: This template uses a split-content model so sender branding, target-company data, shared page chrome, and Pipecat settings can all be managed independently.

hero.title: LYRIQ Enterprise Proposal
hero.description: Use this hero as a proposal surface: a branded banner up top, a live document preview from a Cloudinary URL on the left, and separate sender and recipient company panels on the right.
